message:
Add E2E tests for graceful network failure handling

- New test file: packages/cli/__tests__/e2e/network-failures.test.ts
  - Tests refresh fallback to bundled prompts when registry URL unreachable
  - Tests DNS resolution failure graceful handling
  - Tests list/search/show commands work offline with bundled prompts
  - Tests complete workflow (list→search→show) without network
  - Tests registry status command without network
- Fix: Remove unused import in show.ts (shouldOutputJson was imported but not used)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
